summary.rationale: The merged score viewer remains form-first, uses musical section and measure structure as its hierarchy, preserves the complete three-part score, and adapts system density without horizontal overflow.

notes: Loading and error states remain present.
No destructive flow or competing primary action was introduced.
The approved form is visible before notation.
Desktop keeps four-measure score systems while mobile uses a readable three-measure fallback.
Songs list and detail fit 390px without avoidable overflow or redundant local labels.
The Music Visual Instrument profile is expressed through score hierarchy, rehearsal labels, notation fonts, and restrained surrounding UI.
Compact chord typography from main is preserved across legacy and imported score paths.
The result is organized as a readable musical document rather than a generic data-detail page.
